what_it_does: A fast read-only census of the Company front-end and design-substrate region (canvas/, design/, panels/ — 106 files), mapping each file's location and apparent purpose with a deep-read priority marker. Produces a directory tree, a file inventory table, key findings on FE structure / design substrate / declarative panels, a top-10 priority list, and the documented extend-points for tokens/addresses/components/panels.
observations: Renders a compressed directory tree of canvas/app/src (App.tsx, useAppController.ts, api.ts, registryStore.ts, NodeShape.tsx, kit.tsx, 19 region components, components, extensions), the design/_system corpus, blueprint surfaces, and panels.

Documents the F0 restructure: the former 1659-line Hud carved into api.ts, registryStore.ts, NodeShape.tsx, useAppController.ts (~37 useState), AppContext.ts, and 19 region components under a CSS-grid shell over tldraw.

Maps the design/_system generator pipeline: tokens.json + components.css -> emit.py -> design-system.css (generated, never edit); parse.py -> element-map.json; check.py (coherence + design-lint with --fail-on FORM gate); refcheck/symbols/codeedges produce the code:// reverse-index and dependency graph.

Names the two sources of truth: tokens.json (WARM GOLD theme, sig/await/wire/fail signal split) and addresses.json (ui://<region>/<element>[@state] with capabilities pointable/spotlit/presentable/openable/driven mapped to code+feature).
Describes register.json as the production contract (views/variants/features/journeys/coverage) and the blueprint as the importable build-to-schema spec (B1) with J1-J9 surface specs.
Documents panels/ as pure declarative data (settings.json) proposed via RHM, git-reversible, with registry-overridden field options.
Lists the concrete extend-points (token, address, component, panel, design-lint gate) with the exact commands (python3 emit.py, parse.py, check.py --target --fail-on).
standouts: The generator pipeline as the load-bearing design-substrate mechanism: edit tokens/addresses -> regenerate -> every mockup reflows, with generated files marked do-not-edit.
kit.tsx as the WAVE-2 shared vocabulary (SectionHead/LaneHead/Badge/Surface) enforcing recognition-by-shape+tint as one product language.
The free structural tools (check/refcheck/symbols/codeedges) that produce the ui://->code://->files corpus the backend resolver reads.
conventions: Uses appears-to-be hedging and PRIORITY/MAYBE/NO markers appropriate to a no-deep-synthesis coverage pass.
Marks every generated file NO / do-not-edit, matching the design corpus's registry-as-truth + generated-output discipline.
Documents extend-by-registration consistently (new thing = add registry entry + regenerate).
notes: If briefing someone: this is the FE + design-substrate file map, the fastest way to learn the carved-from-monolith canvas structure, the token/address generator pipeline, and the blueprint/panels mechanisms, plus the exact commands to extend each.
questions: The dist/ and generated _system/*.json are marked do-not-read; are the source tokens.json/addresses.json counts (WARM GOLD, the element addresses) still current?
How many mockups exist under design/mockups (the file says hundreds, not inventoried) and do they all carry data-ui-ref?
purpose_vs_actual: Match. Stated as a fast location+purpose mapping with no deep synthesis, and it delivers a tree, inventory table, key findings, priorities, and extend-points.
apparent_themes: Generated-from-registry design substrate (tokens/addresses -> emit/parse -> CSS + element-map)
Carved-from-monolith FE with a controller hook and 19 region components on a grid shell
Design-lint as the FORM build gate (off-token literals fail the build)
Recognition-by-shape+tint as one product visual language (kit.tsx)
intention_signals: Trying to give the deeper research layer a complete, honestly-scoped inventory of the FE and design-substrate files with priorities and concrete extend-commands, so the design effort knows the existing component structure and registry pipeline it must build on rather than around.
contribution: Contributes the FE + design-substrate file-by-file inventory with the generator-pipeline map, the two sources-of-truth (tokens/addresses), and the documented extend-points/commands; a fused system keeps this as the structural index of the canvas/design/panels region that the deep reads and any surface work build on.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-08 fast read-only census of the Company FE and design substrate (canvas/, design/, panels/ — 106 files) with a directory tree, file-purpose table, the tokens/addresses generator pipeline, the carved-from-monolith canvas structure, deep-read priorities, and documented extend-points.
intention_for_embedding: To give the deep-read research layer an honestly-scoped inventory of the FE and design-substrate files plus their extend-points so the design effort builds on the existing component structure and registry pipeline.
